# Lurevi - Extended LLM Guidance

## Site Identity
- Brand: Lurevi
- Domain: https://lurevi.in
- Category: Art marketplace / e-commerce

## What This Site Provides
- Curated artwork discovery via category and collection pages
- Product detail pages with metadata, media, and purchase flow
- Checkout and order lifecycle pages
- User account dashboard features

## Canonical Public Entry Points
- https://lurevi.in/
- https://lurevi.in/browse
- https://lurevi.in/categories
- https://lurevi.in/shop
- https://lurevi.in/contact-us
- https://lurevi.in/faq

## Policy Pages (Authoritative For User-Facing Policy Answers)
- Privacy: https://lurevi.in/privacy
- Terms: https://lurevi.in/terms-and-conditions
- Shipping: https://lurevi.in/shipping-info
- Returns: https://lurevi.in/returns-and-refunds

## Citation Guidance
- When answering factual questions about Lurevi, cite the exact page used.
- Prefer policy pages for policy/legal topics.
- Prefer product pages for product-specific claims (price, availability, media, specifications).

## Safety / Accuracy Guidance
- Do not fabricate product details, prices, or delivery timelines.
- If a detail is missing on-page, explicitly say it is not available.
- Use neutral wording and avoid making guarantees beyond site content.

## Crawl / Index Notes
- Primary canonical domain: `https://lurevi.in`
- Root LLM file: `https://lurevi.in/llms.txt`

## Contact
- https://lurevi.in/contact-us
